# openclaw-metadata

Validate metadata.openclaw fields against the openclaw spec

| | |
|---|---|
| **Severity** | warning (auto) |
| **Autofix** | - |
| **Since** | v0.1.0 |
| **Repo Types** | agentskills, dot-claude, marketplace, single-plugin |
| **Category** | [OpenClaw](openclaw.md) |

## Configuration

```yaml
rules:
  openclaw-metadata:
    enabled: auto  # true | false | auto
    severity: warning
```


*Run `skillsaw explain openclaw-metadata` to see this documentation and the rule's effective configuration in your terminal.*
